body:
Ford Transit Connect PHEV In an era where sustainability and efficiency are paramount, the Ford Transit Connect PHEV emerges as a beacon of innovation in the commercial vehicle sector. This…

novation in the commercial vehicle sector. This plug-in hybrid van combines the versatility and reliability that businesses need with the added benefit of reduced environmental impact. By stepping into the realm of hybrid technology, the new Ford Transit Connect, particularly the 2024 model, redefines expectations for utility vehicles, offering significant advantages in terms of fuel efficiency, reduced emissions, and operational cost savings. The ford transit connect phev stands not just as a testament to Ford’s commitment to greener transportation solutions but also as a game-changer for professionals and fleets looking to optimize their operations in eco-friendly ways. [Source](https://www.ford.co.uk/vans-and-pickups/new-transit-connect-v761)

Throughout this comprehensive review, we delve into the specifics that make the ford transit connect phev 2024 a must-consider option for those in the market for a new ford transit connect or any plug-in hybrid van. From its sleek design and exterior features that cater to both esthetics and functionality to the interior’s ergonomic layout, enhanced with a 10.25″ Digital Instrument Cluster and USB-C charging sockets. We explore the performance and engine capabilities, highlighting the electric-only range and hybrid transit van’s efficiency. The vehicle’s practical applications, including impressive loadspace dimensions and a zero-emission range, are also scrutinized alongside the latest safety features, ensuring a thorough understanding of what sets this ford phev uk apart. By providing detailed insights into the transit plug-in hybrid’s attributes, including ford transit phev price considerations, this review aims to guide readers through the key factors contributing to the ford transit connect phev’s acclaim in the market. Ford E Transit Custom

## Overview of the Ford Transit Connect PHEV

### History and Development

The journey of the Ford Transit Connect PHEV began with significant milestones that underscored Ford’s commitment to innovation in electric vehicle technology. In 2009, at the Geneva Motor Show, Ford introduced the Ford Tourneo Connect battery electric concept vehicle. This prototype featured a 21 kWh lithium iron phosphate battery pack and a 50 kW permanent magnet motor, capable of a range of up to 160 kilometers and a top speed of approximately 113 kilometers per hour. The development of this technology was in collaboration with Smith Electric Vehicles, highlighting a pivotal step towards sustainable commercial transport solutions. Ford E Transit Custom Double Cab Later that year, Ford confirmed the development of a battery-powered version of the Transit Connect at the Chicago Auto Show, followed by the unveiling of a prototype electric version of the Ford Tourneo Connect passenger van at the Geneva Auto Show. These developments were critical in setting the stage for the later introduction of the plug-in hybrid (PHEV) models. See all Van Sales

### Reasons for Choosing a PHEV Ford Transit Connect PHEV

Choosing a plug-in hybrid vehicle (PHEV) like the Ford Transit Connect PHEV offers numerous benefits, particularly for those looking to balance environmental considerations with performance and practicality. The Transit Connect PHEV, with its advanced hybrid technology, provides an optimal blend of electric and petrol power, allowing for reduced emissions and enhanced fuel efficiency without compromising the vehicle’s capabilities. See all Van Lease deals

he PHEV model boasts impressive features such as a 1.5-liter petrol engine paired with an electric motor, delivering a combined output of 150hp and 330Nm. It is equipped with a seven-speed automatic gearbox and a substantial battery capacity that supports an electric-only range of up to 68 miles. This range is particularly beneficial for urban driving, where frequent starting and stopping occur, allowing the vehicle to operate with zero tailpipe emissions, thereby reducing the environmental impact. Moreover, the PHEV configuration includes multiple modes that enable the driver to manage the use of electric power according to specific needs. This flexibility ensures that for shorter trips, the electric mode can be prioritized, significantly lowering fuel costs and reducing reliance on petrol. For longer journeys, the hybrid system efficiently integrates petrol engine use, ensuring range is not a constraint, thus alleviating range anxiety. The Ford Transit Connect PHEV also features regenerative braking, which recaptures energy typically lost during braking to recharge the battery. This feature not only enhances the efficiency of the electric drive system but also contributes to longer intervals between full recharges, making it an ideal choice for both personal and commercial use. In summary, the Ford Transit Connect PHEV represents a significant advancement in hybrid technology, combining robust utility features with innovative electric capabilities to cater to the evolving needs of modern drivers and businesses seeking sustainable and efficient vehicle solutions. See all Ford Transit Custom for sale

## Design and Exterior Ford Transit Connect PHEV

The Ford Transit Connect PHEV showcases a robust design tailored to meet both esthetic and functional needs. With a focus on versatility and utility, the exterior design of this vehicle integrates several features that enhance its practicality for various professional and lifestyle applications. See all Ford Transit Custom Lease deals

### Shape and Dimensions

The Transit Connect features a newly designed steel bulkhead that not only increases the usable load space by approximately 50 liters but also maintains the vehicle’s sleek appearance. The dimensions are thoughtfully crafted to accommodate substantial cargo; the max load space width exceeds 1.5 meters at the floor, and the height from floor to roof is over 1.2 meters. These dimensions ensure that the van can comfortably hold two Euro-pallets or four standard 8′ x 4′ boards in the load box, making it an ideal choice for transporting large items. See all Hybrid Lease

### Esthetic Choices

In 2021, Ford introduced an innovative new Active lifestyle model, which brought a fresh dimension to the Transit Connect’s design. This model features SUV-inspired styling with raised suspension and an optional mechanical limited slip differential (mLSD), appealing to both lifestyle buyers and working operators who require a van capable of handling rougher terrains and slippery conditions. The Transit Connect Active stands out with its side cladding, door mirrors, and bumpers, complemented by front and rear skid plates that are more cosmetic than functional but add to the vehicle’s rugged look. The shiny 17-inch alloy wheels with a polished finish and roof bars enhance the overall esthetic, making it a visually appealing option for businesses and weekend adventurers alike. ](https://www.vansales.com/)

### Color Options Ford Transit Connect PHEV

While specific color options are not detailed in the provided excerpts, the design elements such as the shiny alloy wheels and skid plates suggest that Ford offers a range of choices to customize the appearance of the Transit Connect PHEV. These options likely include various standard and metallic colors, allowing buyers to personalize their vehicle to suit their style or corporate branding. The Ford Transit Connect PHEV not only meets the practical demands of a commercial vehicle but also addresses the desire for a vehicle with a strong visual presence and adaptability to different environments. Whether it’s for business use or leisure activities, the design and exterior of the Transit Connect PHEV are crafted to impress and perform. ](https://www.vansales.com/product-category/van-sales/ford-vans-for-sale/ford-transit-connect-for-sale/)

## Interior Features Ford Transit Connect PHEV

### Modern Dashboard Layout

The Ford Transit Connect PHEV features a 10-inch digital instrument cluster, standard across all models, which offers a configurable main display surrounded by secondary vehicle information. This is paired with a 10-inch color central touchscreen, creating a sophisticated digital cockpit that not only enhances the esthetic appeal of the dashboard but also improves functionality. Drivers can customize the display with a variety of vehicle data, ensuring all necessary information is readily accessible. See Ford Transit Double Cabs

### Comfort and Usability

Inside the Ford Transit Connect PHEV, comfort meets functionality with options such as heated front seats and a heated steering wheel, both of which can be selected with additional lumbar support certified by Aktion Gesunder Rücken e.V. (AGR), a campaign for healthier backs. These features provide enhanced comfort, especially during long drives. The interior is designed with practicality in mind, featuring a flexible seating concept in the Combi model. The rear seats can fold flat vertically and move forward, transforming the vehicle from a 5-seat passenger car to a two-seat business van in just a few seconds. This flexibility is ideal for dual-use customers who require a vehicle that adapitates quickly to changing needs.

### Infotainment System Ford Transit Connect PHEV

The SYNC 4 system in the Ford Transit Connect PHEV connects drivers to the world like never before, with features such as sophisticated voice recognition and wireless smartphone integration through Apple CarPlay® and Android Auto™. This system includes over-the-air updates and utilizes cloud-connected technology, ensuring that navigation maps are always current and live traffic data is available for real-time route planning. For added convenience, the SYNC touchscreen also provides access to the vehicle’s owner’s manual and a library of useful how-to videos, making it easier for drivers to understand and utilize their vehicle’s features effectively. Additionally, wireless device charging and USB-C ports in the cab, offering up to 45 watts of power, cater to the needs of modern professionals, allowing for the charging of phones, laptops, and other devices on the go.

## Performance and Engine

### Engine Specifications

The Ford Transit Connect PHEV is equipped with a VW-derived 1.5-liter petrol engine, which, when combined with an electric motor and battery, delivers a robust performance. The maximum power output reaches 150PS, and the vehicle supports various driving needs efficiently. Additionally, Ford offers a diesel powertrain option, featuring a 2.0-liter engine available in either 102PS or 122PS configurations, capable of achieving nearly 60mpg, highlighting Ford’s commitment to providing versatile engine solutions.

### Electric Motor and Battery

The heart of the Ford Transit Connect PHEV’s capability lies in its advanced electric motor and battery system. It features a 1.1kWh lithium-ion battery paired with a 91PS electric motor, enabling the van to cover up to 31 miles on electric power alone, with zero tailpipe emissions. This makes it especially suitable for urban operations where reducing environmental impact is crucial. The PHEV powertrain also includes a 1.5-liter EcoBlue diesel engine, enhancing the total system output to 120PS and 340Nm of torque. The vehicle can be fully charged from a standard 230V power supply in approximately 4.5 hours, or more rapidly from a 7.4kW AC wallbox in about 2.5 hours.

### Driving Experience Ford Transit Connect PHEV

Driving the Ford Transit Connect PHEV offers a unique blend of efficiency and productivity. The vehicle is designed to deliver a seamless driving experience, particularly in urban settings where its electric-only range of up to 35 miles proves most beneficial. The inclusion of DC fast charging capability at 50kW allows for quick recharges, ensuring minimal downtime and enhanced operational readiness. Furthermore, the Transit Connect PHEV maintains the Transit Custom’s renowned driving dynamics, providing a familiar yet environmentally friendly driving experience that does not compromise on power or capability.

## Practical Applications Ford Transit Connect PHEV

The Ford Transit Connect PHEV stands out not only for its hybrid capabilities but also for its highly practical applications that cater to diverse commercial and personal needs. The vehicle combines impressive load capacity, interior flexibility, and innovative storage solutions to meet the demands of various users.

### Load Capacity

The Transit Connect boasts a generous cargo volume of up to 127 cubic feet, making it ideal for transporting a wide variety of items. It can handle a payload of up to 1,570 pounds, ensuring that even heavy loads can be carried without compromising performance. The vehicle’s design accommodates two standard Euro pallets, enhancing its utility for businesses that require efficient space utilization for deliveries and transport.

### Interior Flexibility

Ford has designed the Transit Connect with a focus on versatility. The interior can be easily configured to suit a range of needs, thanks to the flexible seating arrangements. The rear seats can be folded down, tumbled forward, or removed entirely, providing super-flexible interior loadspace options. The front passenger seat can also fold flat, allowing for the transportation of extra-long items. This adaptability makes the Transit Connect an excellent choice for both commercial and personal use, where changing space requirements are common.

### Storage Solutions

Efficiency extends to the organization within the Transit Connect. It is equipped with a variety of storage solutions designed to keep the workspace organized and efficient. These include a large overhead shelf, multiple cup holders, and a range of storage compartments located throughout the cabin. The intelligently designed center console features a 12-volt power socket, USB connectivity with charging, and storage areas designed to accommodate an A4 folder. Additionally, the vehicle offers an optional easy-clean load-floor liner and a clever Load-through bulkhead, which allows for the transportation of items up to 3.4 meters in length in the L2 models. Tie-down points are strategically positioned just above the floor on the side wall of the load space, facilitating easier access and cleaner floor maintenance. These practical features underscore the Ford Transit Connect PHEV’s ability to blend functionality with innovation, providing a versatile vehicle solution that meets the evolving needs of modern businesses and active lifestyles.

## Safety Features

### Advanced Driver Assistance Systems

The Ford Transit Connect PHEV is equipped with an array of advanced driver assistance systems designed to enhance safety and provide a more secure driving experience. Key features include Pre-Collision Assist with Auto Emergency Braking and Forward Collision Warning, which help prevent accidents by detecting potential collisions and automatically applying the brakes if necessary. Evasive Steer Assist and Intersection Assist are also integral components, offering additional support in avoiding collisions with other road users. Innovative technologies such as the Ford BlueCruise introduce hands-free driving capabilities, ideal for long highway commutes. This system allows drivers to remove their hands from the steering wheel on designated roads, maintaining a safe cruising speed and distance from other vehicles with Intelligent Adaptive Cruise Control with Stop & Go functionality. This system can bring the vehicle to a complete stop in heavy traffic and resume speed once the traffic clears. Lane Keeping Aid ensures the vehicle remains within lane boundaries, providing alerts and gentle steering assistance if unintended lane departure is detected. The Blind Spot Information System with Cross-Traffic Alert enhances awareness of other vehicles in adjacent lanes or approaching from the sides, especially useful when changing lanes or reversing from parking spots.

### Additional Safety Measures Ford Transit Connect PHEV

Safety extends beyond driving assistance in the Ford Transit Connect PHEV. The vehicle boasts comprehensive safety features designed to protect passengers and enhance vehicle security. Anti-lock brakes (ABS) and Electronic Stability Control are standard, improving vehicle handling under extreme braking and maintaining stability by reducing engine power or applying brakes when loss of control is detected. Occupant safety is bolstered by front-impact, side-impact, and overhead airbags, which provide critical protection during different types of collisions. Seatbelt pretensioners further secure passengers by tightening seatbelts automatically upon detecting a collision, positioning occupants optimally to minimize injury. Additional measures include a security system with an ignition disable device that prevents the engine from starting without the correct key, enhancing anti-theft protection. Roll Stability Control and a robust system of cameras and sensors support the vehicle’s stability and driver’s visibility, contributing to overall safety. These include a Front Wide-View camera and parking assistance technologies that simplify maneuvering in tight spaces. With these extensive safety features, the Ford Transit Connect PHEV not only commits to passenger protection but also ensures peace of mind in various driving environments, making it a reliable choice for both personal and commercial use.

## Conclusion Ford Transit Connect PHEV

In summary, the Ford Transit Connect PHEV stands as an exceptional hybrid vehicle, blending the practicality and robustness needed in a commercial van with the environmental benefits of plug-in hybrid technology. This comprehensive review has explored its myriad features, from its design and practical applications to its performance and advanced safety technology, underlining its potential to redefine the commercial vehicle sector. The Transit Connect PHEV not only meets the modern demands for efficiency and sustainability but does so without compromising on functionality or driving experience, making it a compelling choice for businesses and individuals alike seeking a versatile vehicle solution. The broader implications of adopting such hybrid technology in commercial vehicles extend far into the future of transportation, pushing towards a greener, more efficient fleet across industries. As we conclude, the Ford Transit Connect PHEV exemplifies Ford’s commitment to innovation and environmental stewardship, suggesting a path forward for others in the industry. Furthermore, its introduction could significantly impact urban logistics, reducing emissions and operating costs for businesses. For those considering the shift to a more sustainable vehicle without sacrificing performance, the Transit Connect PHEV represents a forward-thinking, practical investment, signaling a pivotal step toward a cleaner, more efficient future in commercial transport.

## FAQs

**What are the typical issues encountered with the Ford Transit Connect?** The Ford Transit Connect commonly faces problems such as transmission failure, engine failure, and issues with the panoramic roof panel becoming loose. **How dependable is the Ford Transit Connect?** The Ford Transit Connect has a reliability rating of 3.0 out of 5.0, positioning it 5th among 21 commercial vans. The average yearly maintenance cost is $926, indicating higher-than-average ownership costs. **What is the driving range of the Ford Transit Connect Plug-In Hybrid?** The Ford Transit Custom Plug-In Hybrid (PHEV) can travel up to 35 miles on electric power alone according to the NEDC cycle, and has a total range of 310 miles with the assistance of a 1.0-liter EcoBoost petrol engine used as a range extender. **Why has Ford decided to stop selling the Transit Connect?** Ford discontinued the Transit Connect in the U.S. in 2023 as part of a broader move to cut global manufacturing costs and simplify production, coupled with a decline in demand within the compact van market. Other manufacturers like Ram, General Motors, Nissan, and Mercedes-Benz have also exited this market segmen
